market: US x Iran ceasefire by April 15
learning: CLV negative ALL 25 snapshots from day 1. Market disagreed with thesis from start. Exit faster when CLV never turns positive.

market: Will Ethereum dip to 1800 in March
learning: Illiquid tail-risk markets gap through stoploss levels. Book had no bids above 0.01. For illiquid positions, exit at -20pct not -25pct.
Thin order book forced selling in 3 batches at declining prices. Stoploss fill was 50pct worse than trigger price.
Ledger-based dashboard drifted from on-chain reality. Rebuilt to use ONLY on-chain data. Never trust ledger for current positions.

market: SYSTEM: Failed to take profits at peaks
learning: Were in profit twice and gave it back both times. No profit-taking rules existed. Only had loss rules. Must add trailing stops and take-profit targets.
Held positions through peaks waiting for expiry. Time decay and mean reversion eroded gains.
Comparing PM prices with bookmaker composite odds reveals clear edges. Finland overpriced by 8.7pct on PM vs 14 bookmakers. Method: scrape eurovisionworld.com, compare with PM.

market: SYSTEM: NAV calculation wrong - incomplete ledger
learning: Ledger had 6 of 17 closed trades. Dashboard showed wrong NAV. Cash was off by 100 dollars. Root cause: trades closed via different scripts and manual exits never logged to ledger. Single source of truth was broken.

market: SYSTEM: Presented wrong NAV 5 times in one day
learning: Showed different wrong NAV numbers throughout the day. Root cause: presented unverified numbers with confidence instead of saying I dont know. Fix: never present a number you cant verify from on-chain source.

market: SYSTEM: Failed to act on ground troops news immediately
learning: Ground troops breaking news came in at 18:56. I analyzed it, said it was massive, then did NOTHING. Waited for Gaute to ask. Classic anti-passivity failure. News sentinel should trigger automatic trade evaluation AND execution, not just alerting.

market: SYSTEM: Need auto-trade on news alerts
learning: Python script can give clearer trade recommendations than me in the moment. Script has no passivity bias. Build news_to_trade.py that outputs specific BUY/SELL recommendations with sizing when sentinel fires.

market: SYSTEM: Cannot sell NO on NegRisk markets
learning: NegRisk NO orderbook shows 0.01/0.99 adapter pattern. Selling NO at 0.01 = giving away shares. Cannot trim NegRisk NO positions via CLOB. They sit to expiry.

market: Iowa State NCAA - no exit strategy defined
learning: Placed NCAA basket bet without kill condition. Tournament markets are binary - team is in or out. Must define at entry: if eliminated hold to zero, budget is the max loss. Basket strategy means individual losses are expected.
